message_mapping.item: The payment request was invalid. Please check your details and try again.
Payment authentication failed. Please contact the store administrator.
Payment authorization denied. Please contact the store administrator.
Payment service endpoint not found. Please try again later.
Payment gateway encountered an internal error. Please try again later.
Payment gateway is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Payment gateway is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
An error occurred while processing your payment. Please try again.
No response received from the payment gateway. Please try again.
Your payment was not successful. Please try again or use a different payment method.
Your payment was declined. Please check your card details or try a different card.
An error occurred during payment processing. Please try again.
Insufficient funds. Please try a different card.
Invalid card details. Please check and try again.
Your card has expired. Please use a different card.
Card limit exceeded. Please try a different card or contact your bank.
3D Secure verification failed. Please try again.
3D Secure verification timed out. Please try again.
